bio.description: Driven by curiosity and a love for building, I create simple, functional, and visually striking digital products. As a solopreneur, I'm always shipping and exploring new ideas.
bio.tagline: My passion for design, development, and making things people actually use drives every project I take on. Based in Córdoba, Argentina.

autogestioncmpc.description: Autogestion platform for more than 22,000 doctors in Cordoba, Argentina, with integrated payments and document management.
